chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1118 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.4663/2023 (Ex.A) 2. For orders on CMA No.4664/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 31.08.2023 None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
